_notes: Definitive Pictos/Lumina reference. 194 entries from Fandom wiki merged with player data. JSON is source of truth — generate Markdown via scripts.

pictos.name: Accelerating Heal
pictos.effect: Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn.

pictos.name: Accelerating Last Stand
pictos.effect: Gain Rush if fighting alone.

pictos.name: Accelerating Shots
pictos.effect: 20% chance to gain Rush on Free Aim shot.

pictos.name: Accelerating Tint
pictos.effect: Healing Tints also apply Rush.

pictos.name: Aegis Revival
pictos.effect: +1 Shield on being revived.

pictos.name: Anti-Blight
pictos.effect: Immune to Blight

pictos.effect: Immune to Burn

pictos.effect: Immune to Charm.

pictos.effect: Immune to Freeze

pictos.name: Anti-Stun
pictos.effect: Immune to Stun.

pictos.name: At Death's Door
pictos.effect: Deal 50% more damage if Health is below 10%.

pictos.name: Attack Lifesteal
pictos.effect: Recover 15% Health on Base Attack.

pictos.effect: 50% increased Free Aim damage.

pictos.name: Augmented Attack
pictos.effect: 50% increased Base Attack damage.

pictos.effect: 25% increased Counterattack damage.

pictos.effect: 50% increased Counterattack damage.

pictos.name: Augmented Counter III
pictos.effect: 75% increased Counterattack damage.

pictos.name: Augmented First Strike
pictos.effect: 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle.

pictos.name: Auto Death
pictos.effect: Kill self on turn start.
pictos.notes: Used with Second Chance to apply buffs/debuffs on battle start. Not recommended for Matt.

pictos.name: Auto Powerful
pictos.effect: Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start.

pictos.name: Auto Regen
pictos.effect: Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start.

pictos.name: Auto Rush
pictos.effect: Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start.

pictos.name: Auto Shell
pictos.effect: Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start.

pictos.name: Base Shield
pictos.effect: Grants 1 Shield HP buffer per turn
pictos.notes: Moved to Lumina this session — Pictos slot freed

pictos.name: Beneficial Contamination
pictos.effect: +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn.

pictos.name: Break Specialist
pictos.effect: Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%.

pictos.effect: 25% increased Break damage.

pictos.effect: 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies.

pictos.effect: Fully charge enemy break bar on death

pictos.effect: 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies.

pictos.name: Cheater

pictos.effect: Base Attack has 1 extra hit.

pictos.name: Dead Energy II
pictos.effect: +3 AP on killing an enemy.

pictos.effect: Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn.

pictos.effect: 5% increased damage per consecutive dodge, stacks up to 10

pictos.effect: +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn.

pictos.effect: +1 AP per Gradient Charge consumed.

pictos.effect: +1 AP on battle start.

pictos.effect: +1 AP on battle start.

pictos.effect: +1 AP on battle start.

pictos.effect: Every AP gain is increased by 1

pictos.effect: 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on self.

entries.name: Painted Power
entries.notes: Essential for all characters from Act 3 onwards

entries.name: Base Shield
entries.notes: Verso: non-functional with Chevalam as L4 effect prevents shields

entries.name: Energising Turn
entries.notes: Main AP flow generator; boosted by Energy Master

reserve_team.notes: Main team core minus Cheater, Dead Energy I, Dead Energy II.

candidates_for_review.name: Energy Master
candidates_for_review.notes: Game-change but expensive; consider when expanding core set.

candidates_for_review.name: Energising Burn
candidates_for_review.notes: Consider when expanding core set — all characters have Burning Shots so fires regularly.

candidates_for_review.name: Empowering Dodge
candidates_for_review.notes: Test empirically before committing — reset on parry unconfirmed.

situational_lumina.name: Anti-Blight
situational_lumina.notes: All characters — vs bosses applying Blight. Add as Lumina; no need to move Pictos.

situational_lumina.name: Anti-Burn
situational_lumina.notes: All characters — vs bosses applying Burn regularly.

situational_lumina.name: Anti-Freeze
situational_lumina.notes: All characters — vs bosses applying Freeze. LP cost unconfirmed.

situational_lumina.name: Draining Cleanse
situational_lumina.notes: Status effect prevention — 1AP cost per use. High LP cost; situational.
